headline: Mohawk Industries (MHK) Stock After CEO Transition Plans A Fresh Look At Valuation
summary: Mohawk Industries (MHK) is in focus after the company announced that President and Chief Operating Officer Paul F. De Cock will succeed long serving CEO Jeffrey S. Lorberbaum and join the Board in late 2026. See our latest analysis for Mohawk Industries. The CEO transition headlines arrive after a sharp 1-day share price return of 7.47%, capping a 30-day share price return of 9.92% and a softer year-to-date share price return that is roughly flat. The 5-year total shareholder return is...
